Hero.description: I specialize in building modern web interfaces using technologies like Next.js and Tailwind CSS. I focus on creating responsive, accessible, and maintainable user interfaces while ensuring smooth user experience and clean code structure across every project.

About.title: Why hire me for your next project?
About.description1: I worked with a various background of clients and different types of products as a software engineer (frontend) or UI designer. I help them to solve their business problems on the technology end.
About.description2: I have a principle that is "stay simple and stay humble". I believe simplicity hides a great deal of complexity and thoroughness. I see every project as a process of solving a problem. Now it's time to solve your problems in detail, in depth, and of course with simplicity.

Contact.title: Let’s work together
Contact.desc: Feel free to reach out for collaboration.
Contact.subject: Let's Work Together
Contact.body: Hi Pande, I want to discuss a project with you.
